name: EuranceEscrow

methods.name: opt_in_asa
methods.desc:
Opt the contract account into the stablecoin ASA (EURD or USDC).
Call once after deployment.  Contract must hold ≥ 0.1 ALGO for the MBR.

methods.name: transfer_admin
methods.desc: Transfer admin role to a multisig or DAO address.

methods.name: set_kyc_status
methods.desc:
[MiCA Placeholder — Regulated Wallet Mapping]
Records whether a wallet has passed KYC/AML verification. Admin-only.  In production, call this from your VASP / KYC oracle backend after MiCA Article 68 / FATF Travel Rule checks.

methods.name: is_kyc_verified
methods.desc: Return KYC status of an address (False if never set).

methods.name: create_task
methods.desc:
Lock stablecoin funds in escrow and register a new task.
Caller must compose an atomic group:   [i-1]  AssetTransfer  — stablecoin from client → contract address   [i]    ApplicationCall — this method
Returns the assigned task ID. Reverts if client wallet is not KYC-verified (MiCA compliance).

methods.name: mark_complete
methods.desc:
Freelancer (AI agent) signals that the deliverable is ready for review.
ACTIVE → COMPLETE.

methods.name: release_payment
methods.desc:
Client approves the work and releases stablecoin to the freelancer.
This is the x402 settlement leg: contract → freelancer wallet. COMPLETE → RELEASED.

methods.name: dispute_task
methods.desc:
Either party raises a dispute, freezing funds until admin arbitrates.
Allowed from ACTIVE or COMPLETE. → DISPUTED.

methods.name: admin_resolve
methods.desc:
Admin arbitrates a DISPUTED task.
release_to_freelancer=True  → pay freelancer (RELEASED). release_to_freelancer=False → refund client  (REFUNDED).

methods.name: admin_refund
methods.desc:
Admin cancels an ACTIVE task and returns funds to the client.
Use when the freelancer is unresponsive or the task is withdrawn.

methods.name: get_task
methods.desc: Return the full task record. Used by frontend and AI agents.

methods.name: get_task_count
methods.desc: Total tasks ever created (includes completed and refunded).

desc:
MiCA-compliant x402 Escrow Contract for EURance Agentic Commerce.

    Flow
    ────
    1. Admin deploys → calls opt_in_asa() to accept the stablecoin ASA.
    2. Admin whitelists client wallets via set_kyc_status() (MiCA gate).
    3. Client submits atomic group:  [AssetTransfer EURD→contract]  +  [create_task()]
    4. Freelancer (AI agent) calls mark_complete() after delivering work.
    5. Client calls release_payment() → contract sends ASA to freelancer.
    6. Either party may dispute; admin resolves via admin_resolve().

    MiCA Note
    ─────────
    kyc_verified mapping + _require_kyc() guard model MiCA Article 68 /
    FATF Travel Rule compliance.  In production: wire a KYC oracle (Sumsub,
    Jumio, Quantoz VASP API) to call set_kyc_status() after AML verification.

sourceInfo.errorMessage: Only ACTIVE tasks can be admin-refunded
Only task parties can raise a dispute
Stablecoin must be sent to contract
Task must be ACTIVE or COMPLETE to dispute
